huskylensv2_init_i2c_until.message0: Initialize HuskyLensV2 %1 I2C interface %2 until successful
huskylensv2_init_i2c_until.tooltip: Initialize HuskyLensV2 via I2C, loop until successful

huskylensv2_init_serial.tooltip: Initialize HuskyLensV2 through the serial port (the baud rate is automatically selected according to the board)

huskylensv2_set_algorithm_until.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 switches to %2 algorithm until successful
huskylensv2_set_algorithm_until.tooltip: Switch algorithm and loop until success

huskylensv2_get_result.tooltip: Request the identification results of the specified algorithm and cache them

huskylensv2_get_result_until.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Get %2 algorithm result until successful
huskylensv2_get_result_until.tooltip: Loop requests until results are obtained

huskylensv2_available.tooltip: Whether there are still cached results (bool)

huskylensv2_count_id.tooltip: The number of detections for the specified ID

huskylensv2_pop_result.tooltip: popCachedResult, the official recommended consumption method

huskylensv2_upcoming_branch_count.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 algorithm %2 Number of intersections ahead

huskylensv2_learn_block.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Algorithm %2 Learning Area X %3 Y %4 Width %5 High %6

huskylensv2_learn_block_value.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Algorithm %2 Learning Area X %3 Y %4 Width %5 High %6 Return ID

huskylensv2_draw_rect.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Draw rectangle Color %2 Line width %3 X %4 Y %5 Width %6 Height %7

huskylensv2_draw_unique_rect.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Draw a unique rectangle Color %2 Line width %3 X %4 Y %5 Width %6 High %7

huskylensv2_draw_text.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Draw text Color %2 Font size %3 X %4 Y %5 Content %6

huskylensv2_save_knowledge.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Algorithm %2 Save knowledge base to ID %3

huskylensv2_load_knowledge.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Algorithm %2 Load knowledge base from ID %3

huskylensv2_set_name.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Algorithm %2 Set ID %3 Name is %4

huskylensv2_set_algo_param_bool.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 algorithm %2 sets boolean parameter %3 to %4

huskylensv2_set_algo_param_float.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 algorithm %2 sets the floating point parameter %3 to %4

huskylensv2_set_algo_param_string.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 algorithm %2 sets the string parameter %3 to %4

huskylensv2_face_leye.tooltip: FaceResult left eye (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_face_reye.tooltip: FaceResult right eye (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_face_lmouth.message0: Face result %1 Left corner of mouth %2
huskylensv2_face_lmouth.tooltip: FaceResult left corner of mouth (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_face_rmouth.message0: Face result %1 Right corner of mouth %2
huskylensv2_face_rmouth.tooltip: FaceResult right corner of mouth (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_hand_point.tooltip: HandResult key points (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_pose_point.tooltip: PoseResult key points (requires large memory board)

huskylensv2_set_multi_algorithm.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Set multiple algorithms Algorithm 1 %2 Algorithm 2 %3 Algorithm 3 %4

huskylensv2_set_multi_algorithm_ratio.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Set algorithm priority Scale 1 %2 Scale 2 %3 Scale 3 %4

huskylensv2_start_recording.message0: HuskyLensV2 %1 Start recording %2 Duration %3 seconds File name %4 Resolution %5
